$nicknameKey..write: auth != null && (!data.exists() ? newData.val() === auth.uid : data.val() === auth.uid && newData.val() === auth.uid)

$campaignId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && newData.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid) || data.child('ownerUid').val() === auth.uid)

$uid..write: auth != null && (root.child('campaigns/' + $campaignId + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid || ($uid === auth.uid && data.exists() && data.child('status').val() === 'pending' && newData.child('status').val() === 'accepted' && newData.child('role').val() === 'player'))

$inviteId..write: auth != null && ((!data.exists() && root.child('campaigns/' + newData.child('campaignId').val() + '/ownerUid').val() === auth.uid && newData.child('targetUid').val() === $uid) || (data.exists() && auth.uid === $uid))
